finding_results.notes: Compressed the clinic-side taxonomy to representative thresholds, left the testimony portion unscripted until Car 8, opened the detainee scene on door order and crowd-window constraints before any tactic recap, and replaced the final miracle warning with the consequence of witnesses being split by dawn.
finding_results.summary: The chapter now states the stoppage map once in the clinic, develops the public-testimony plan only once in Car 8, and turns the late repeated ethics beats into timing and failure costs.

summary: Revised chapter 11 to reduce strategy recap, foreground operational sequence and witness choreography, and convert repeated private-rescue warnings into concrete platform-risk consequences.
